fields.title: Below are a number of problems that people sometimes report in response to traumatic or stressful life events.
fields.description: Please read each item carefully, then select one of the numbers to indicate how much you have been bothered by that problem in the past month.

fields.title: In the past month have the above problems:
How true is this of you?
In the past month, have the above problems in emotions, in beliefs about yourself and in relationships:
In the past week, how much were you bothered by:

fields.description:
Please provide some feedback on your experience with the Self-Care Traumatic Episode Protocol (STEP).

We value your input! Please take a few moments to complete our anonymous feedback form. Your feedback is essential in helping us refine our protocol and enhance the overall user experience. By sharing your thoughts, you'll contribute to creating a more effective and supportive process for everyone. 

Thank you for your time and insights!
